query: SELECT DATE(`tradeDate`) as date, SUM(CAST(`pnl` AS DECIMAL(15,4))) as totalPnl, COUNT(*) as tradeCount FROM `trades` WHERE `userId` = 1 AND `status` = 'closed' AND `tradeDate` >= '2026-03-03 15:51:44' AND `tradeDate` <= '2026-03-31 14:51:44' GROUP BY DATE(`tradeDate`) ORDER BY DATE(`tradeDate`);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user DudnYU5DJGjDb7x.f55d5c05eef2 --database ABPfAgYoAEjhmeNLtca7tc --execute SELECT DATE(`tradeDate`) as date, SUM(CAST(`pnl` AS DECIMAL(15,4))) as totalPnl, COUNT(*) as tradeCount FROM `trades` WHERE `userId` = 1 AND `status` = 'closed' AND `tradeDate` >= '2026-03-03 15:51:44' AND `tradeDate` <= '2026-03-31 14:51:44' GROUP BY DATE(`tradeDate`) ORDER BY DATE(`tradeDate`);
